button.label: Watch Sender
button.screentip: Add the selected message's sender address to the watch list (uses the default alert type).

button.label: Watch Domain
button.screentip: Add the selected sender's whole domain to the watch list (uses the default alert type).

button.label: Watch List
button.screentip: Add or remove watched addresses / domains and choose which alert type each one fires.

button.label: Alert Types
button.screentip: Create or edit alert types - the text to send and the Pushover sound to use.

button.label: Custom Sounds
button.screentip: Add or remove the names of custom sounds you've uploaded to your Pushover app.

button.label: Pushover Settings
button.screentip: Enter your Pushover API token and user key, and pick the default alert type.

button.label: Edit Files
button.screentip: Open watchlist.txt, alerttypes.txt and settings.txt in Notepad.

button.label: Send Test
button.screentip: Send a test Pushover notification to confirm your credentials work.

button.label: Rescan Unread
button.screentip: Re-check unread Inbox mail and alert on any from watched senders.

toggleButton.screentip: Master switch for automatic alerting. Turn off to stop sending push notifications without losing your lists.
Show a pop-up confirmation for manual actions like Send Test and adding to the watch list.
